CustomField.formula: IF( AND(Flosum__Job_Completed__c , Flosum__Succeed__c, NOT(Flosum__Is_Error__c)) , IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Success.png', 'No issues', 30, 150) , IF( AND(Flosum__Job_Completed__c , Flosum__Succeed__c, Flosum__Is_Error__c) , IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Partial.png', 'Issues found', 30, 150) , IF( AND(NOT(Flosum__Job_Completed__c) , ISPICKVAL(Flosum__Status__c, 'Not Started') ) , IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/NotStarted.png', 'Not Started', 30, 150) , IF( AND(Flosum__Job_Completed__c, ISPICKVAL(Flosum__Status__c, 'Did Not Run') ) , IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/DidNotRun.png', 'Did Not Run', 30, 150) , IF ( NOT(Flosum__Job_Completed__c), IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Progress.png', 'In Progress', 30, 150), IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'IconsUtility/Failed.png', 'Issues found', 30, 150) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Result
